title: polygala sphaerocephala
intro: Polygala sphaerocephala, also known as Chinese senega or senega root, is a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala sphaerocephala include its ability to relieve coughs and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is typically dried and processed into teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal use.
